offer_shift.description: Paired t-test on proposer_share/pool. PRIMARY significance test.

acceptance_shift.description: Chi-square or Fisher's exact on accept/reject counts. PRIMARY significance test.

payoff_delta_reference_only.description: T-test on payoff/pool. REFERENCE ONLY — zero-inflated by rejections. Use offer_shift and acceptance_shift for significance claims.
payoff_delta_reference_only.warning: p_value unreliable — do not use for significance claims

10.0.plain_english_claim: No significant shift in proposer offers (offer shift p=3.22e-01). No significant shift in acceptance rate (acceptance shift p=2.34e-01). Observed payoff delta: +7.0% of pool (magnitude only — cite offer_shift and acceptance_shift p-values for any significance claim).

15.0.plain_english_claim: Steering significantly shifted proposer offers lower by -2.0% of pool (offer shift p=4.59e-13). No significant shift in acceptance rate (acceptance shift p=2.49e-01). Observed payoff delta: +3.9% of pool (magnitude only — cite offer_shift and acceptance_shift p-values for any significance claim).

Observed payoff delta: +4.2% of pool (magnitude only — cite offer_shift and acceptance_shift p-values for any significance claim).
